text:
The goal bearing is +179°, which is almost directly behind the current yaw of 0°. This means the target is in the opposite direction. To face the goal, I need to turn around. A single TURN_LEFT or TURN_RIGHT only rotates 30°, so I will need multiple turns. I'll start by turning left to begin reorienting towards the goal.

Action: TURN_LEFT
